subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Cruttwell, spoken on 1913-05-27
subcodes.first_line: O Thou Almighty! Direct Thou this traveller toward the pathway of Thy guidance! Suffer this thirsty one to reach to the fountainhead of Thy bestowal!
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for nearness to God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @living waters; water of life
